summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Bank Transfer dual payment method feature. Backend: 9/9 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All UI features verified including checkout page dual payment methods, bank transfer page with BCA details, admin transactions with verify/reject buttons, and status filter.
seed_data_creation: Multiple bank transfer transactions created during testing (BT-* order IDs)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Bank transfer feature fully implemented and tested. Bank transfer transactions use BT- prefix for order_id. Status flow: pending -> waiting_verification (after proof upload) -> success/rejected (admin action). Admin verify/reject uses transaction 'id' field (UUID), not order_id. All tests use REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL environment variable.
